3324170.name: Blamcon ARC - Advanced Remote Console
3324170.description:
CONFIGURE YOUR BLAMCON LIGHT GUN

This utility will help you configure your Blamcon Light gun

  • Set Up Your Blamcon

  • Customize Default Key Bindings

  • Test Your Light Gun's Functions

COMPLETE CONTROL

The Blamcon ARC (Advanced Remote Console) allows you to customize all functions of your Blamcon Light Gun.

ADVANCED FUNCTIONS

Set functions like: Offscreen Reload, Sensor Layout, Emulation Mode, and even select between different cursor smoothing algorithms to play the way that's best for you.
